title: LoRA Mathematics
code:
import numpy as np

def lora_forward(x, W0, A, B, alpha=16, r=8):
    h0 = np.dot(x, W0)
    h_lora = np.dot(np.dot(x, A), B) * (alpha / r)
    return h0 + h_lora

def run_practice():
    x = np.array([1.0, 1.0])
    W0 = np.zeros((2, 2))
    A = np.array([[1.0, 0.0], [0.0, 1.0]])
    B = np.array([[1.0, 0.0], [0.0, 1.0]])
    out = lora_forward(x, W0, A, B, 8, 8)
    assert np.allclose(out, x)
    print('[PASS] LoRA forward calculations verified.')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    run_practice()
